initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    item.i_item_sk,
    item.i_item_id
FROM 
    item,
    store_sales,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
    item.i_item_sk, 
    item.i_item_id
HAVING 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) = 0
    AND item.i_item_sk IN (
        SELECT 
            ss_item_sk
        FROM 
            store_sales,
            date_dim
        WHERE 
            store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
            AND date_dim.d_year = 2000
            AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
        GROUP BY 
            ss_item_sk
        HAVING 
            SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) > 0
    )
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  item.i_item_sk,
  item.i_item_id
FROM
  item
  JOIN store_sales ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY
  item.i_item_sk,
  item.i_item_id
HAVING
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) = 0
  AND item.i_item_sk IN (
    SELECT ss_item_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000
      AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
    HAVING SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) > 0
  )
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_item_sk,
    item.i_item_id
FROM 
    item,
    store_sales,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
    item.i_item_sk, 
    item.i_item_id
HAVING 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) = 0
    AND item.i_item_sk IN (
        SELECT 
            ss_item_sk
        FROM 
            store_sales,
            date_dim
        WHERE 
            store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
            AND date_dim.d_year = 2000
            AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
        GROUP BY 
            ss_item_sk
        HAVING 
            SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) > 0
    )
LIMIT 100;

SELECT item.i_item_sk, item.i_item_id
FROM item, store_sales, date_dim
WHERE store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_year = 2000
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY item.i_item_sk, item.i_item_id
HAVING SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) > 0
EXCEPT
SELECT item.i_item_sk, item.i_item_id
FROM item, store_sales, date_dim
WHERE store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY item.i_item_sk, item.i_item_id
HAVING SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) > 0
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  i_item_sk,
  i_item_id
FROM 
  item,
  store_sales,
  date_dim
WHERE 
  item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
  item.i_item_sk, item.i_item_id
HAVING 
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) = 0
ORDER BY 
  i_item_sk
LIMIT 100

candidates.sql:
WITH sales_2001_dec AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_sk,
    i_item_id
  FROM 
    item,
    store_sales,
    date_dim
  WHERE 
    item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
  GROUP BY 
    i_item_sk, i_item_id
  HAVING 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) = 0
),
sales_2000_dec AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_sk
  FROM 
    item,
    store_sales,
    date_dim
  WHERE 
    item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 2000
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
  GROUP BY 
    i_item_sk
)
SELECT 
  s2001.i_item_sk,
  s2001.i_item_id
FROM 
  sales_2001_dec s2001
  INNER JOIN sales_2000_dec s2000 ON s2001.i_item_sk = s2000.i_item_sk
ORDER BY 
  s2001.i_item_sk
LIMIT 100
